LIYANG GUO
Paris, France | Chinese national | Mandarin (native), French & English (fluent)

SUMMARY
Strategy professional with 7 years in management consulting (pharma / life sciences),
currently pursuing an INSEAD MBA (Class of December 2026, Fontainebleau). Targeting roles
in AI product management and Private Equity / Venture Capital.

EXPERIENCE
Monitor Deloitte, Strategy Manager / Senior Consultant / Consultant
Paris, 2018–2025
- Led pricing strategy and market-access engagements for global pharmaceutical clients.
- Ran commercial due diligence for private-equity buyers on healthcare assets.
- Built corporate strategy and growth plans across European and Chinese markets.

EDUCATION
INSEAD, MBA, Class of December 2026 (Fontainebleau). INSEAD AI Club; PE & VC Club.
ESSEC Business School, MSc, Strategy & Management of International Business, 2016–2018.
Tongji University, BBA, 2012–2016.

TARGETS
- Industry: AI / Technology; Private Equity & Venture Capital.
- Role: AI Product Manager; Investment roles (PE/VC).
- Companies of interest: Mistral, Anthropic, Iris Capital.
- Geography: Paris and broader Europe.

SKILLS
Strategy, pricing, market access, commercial due diligence, quantitative analysis,
AI product prototyping. Work authorization: China; France (student visa).
